name: Tippy Coachella
description:
Tippy is adorable and one of my favorites- she already has an adorable personality 
She has the short cobby body and short little legs- she has the extreme flat face with bright green eyes and tiny brown button nose 
She is ckc registered at this price but akc is available for an additional fee and can be added anytime the first year

name: Kimchi
description: This tiny little guy is Kimchi. He is solid chocolate with a white chest and a little white on his chin. He looks like a little baby seal.  He has a flat smooshie face, a tiny turned up button nose, and big round eyes. He is charting to be 6 pounds. Listed with CKC, but AKC is available for an additional fee.

name: Westley
description:
This handsome little boy is Westley; he is from our International Champion Susie.
He was born May 25, on Memorial Day. He is dark chocolate and white, with awesome double coat, beautiful flat face, perfect dome head, and great tail set. This little guy is definitely a showstopper. He is already so sweet and friendly. Very charismatic personality.  He is offered with CKC registration, but AKC registration is available for an additional fee anytime within the first year.

name: Rosie
description: Rosie is 2 years old and very sweet. She solid chocolate with a little white on her chest and one foot. She currently has a pink tail and ears from creative grooming but that should wash out with a few more baths. She's calm but loves playing with toys. You can usually find her in the toy box. We are only letting her go because we don't have a male for her as we don't like to line breed. She is listed with CKC registration at this price, but AKC is available for an additional fee and can be added anytime within one year.
